title: AI is KILLING your SaaS! Here's WHY. #shorts
summary: AI agents are evolving rapidly and pose a competitive threat to SaaS businesses. The video addresses how companies must adapt their strategies to survive in a landscape where sophisticated AI models are becoming more capable competitors.
writeup: This short argues that rapidly evolving AI agents are becoming capable competitors to SaaS businesses. It matters because increasingly sophisticated AI models can encroach on functions that software companies have traditionally sold. The takeaway: companies need to adapt their strategies to survive as agents grow more capable.
